example: If I could be anything, I would be a doctor.
I would work in a doctor's office.
I would wear a white lab coat and a stethoscope around my neck.
I would use my stethoscope to listen to my patient's heartbeat.
I would use a reflex hammer to check my patient's reflexes.
I checked her temperature like a thermometer.
If the thermometer turns red, it means the patient has a fever.
If I see germs inside the patient's throat, I would say, please go away, yucky germs.
If the germs don't leave, I'll give my patient medicine.
A lot of doctors and nurses too, we work as a team, like superheroes.
There's machines that help us know how the patient is feeling.
I would use my x-ray goggles to see if it was broken.
I would wrap the giant's leg up in a big blue cast so that it can heal.
